rag_rules: Place assume/guarantee declarations in component type scopes for interface behavior; use implementation scopes for assign clauses.
Use `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks to contain AGREE contract elements.
generic_rules: Use visible identifiers and named constants in AGREE expressions to define bounds or logical relationships.
Structure AGREE contracts with clear labels for assumptions and guarantees.
Define equations and constants in component type annexes when describing interface behavior.
Assign implementation-level bindings in component implementation annexes.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE syntax uses `assume "label": expression;`, `guarantee "label": expression;`, `eq name : type = expression;`, and `const name : type = value;`.
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-specific assign clauses in component type scopes.
Avoid encoding AADL timing properties as AGREE variables unless explicit typed ports or constants are available.
irrelevant_topics: AADL property names as AGREE variables
